Digital War-room
===================================

**Emerald** is a macroscopic, cryogenic *MAGIC* ion trap, fully developed at *eleQtron GmbH* <https://eleqtron.com/en/>`_

.. note::

   This project is under active development.

.. graphviz::

     digraph example {
         a [label="sphinx", href="https://www.sphinx-doc.org/", target="_top"];
         b [label="other"];
         a -> b;
     }
